title: <command-line>: fatal error: VMockArrayTestbench__pch.h.fast: No such file or directory
body:
Using Verilator 5.027 devel rev v5.026-26-gb66fdd742, running on Ubuntu 23.10.

To reproduce:

unzip [error4.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/16156560/error4.zip)

Note! I had to use `zip -Z bzip2` get under the size limit on github.

```
$ verilator --cc --exe MockArrayTestbench-harness.cpp --assert --coverage-user -Wno-fatal -Wno-WIDTH -Wno-STMTDLY --top-module MockArrayTestbench +define+TOP_TYPE=VMockArrayTestbench -CFLAGS "-O1 -DVL_USER_STOP -DVL_USER_FATAL -DVL_USER_FINISH -DTOP_TYPE=VMockArrayTestbench -include VMockArrayTestbench.h -fPIC -shared -fvisibility=hidden -Mdir verilated -LDFLAGS -shared -dynamiclib -fvisibility=hidden" --trace -f firrtl_black_box_resource_files.f --bbox-unsup MockArrayTestbench.sv
$ make -C verilated -f VMockArrayTestbench.mk VMockArrayTestbench
```

Output:

```
[deleted]
<command-line>: fatal error: VMockArrayTestbench__pch.h.fast: No such file or directory
[deleted]
```
